category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a fast cross-platform package manager; official Micromamba docs call it a tiny version of the mamba package manager.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is micromamba; official Mamba documentation page is titled Micromamba User Guide.
docs_sources: Official Mamba documentation includes a dedicated Micromamba User Guide and broader Mamba docs for configuration, installation, and package solving.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/mamba-org/mamba; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify mamba/micromamba package-manager CLIs; official docs describe micromamba as a statically linked C++ executable for package environments and CI/Docker use.
